what_worked: Higher learning rate (0.0954) helped — faster adaptation to prize structure
hypotheses_for_next_agent: Try MLP policy (h=64 or h=128) with same lr=0.0954 — non-linear features may extract more signal from odds + crowd %
Try entropy=0.01 — reduce exploration once a good LR is found
Try k=32 — wider system bet coverage increases chances of hitting rang2 at the cost of more grids per round
Try reward shaping: scale reward by 1/implied_prob of the correct outcome to encourage backing value bets (upsets)
